name: setup-oras
description: Set up your GitHub Actions workflow with a specific version of ORAS

scripts.build: esbuild src/setup.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node24 --metafile=dist/meta.json --outfile=dist/index.js && node scripts/generate-licenses.js dist/meta.json dist/licenses.txt && rm dist/meta.json

author: ORAS
